findings.description: Section s5 covers the BeanUtil呼び出し時の設定 sub-section which uses CopyOptions.Builder methods `datePatternByName` and `converterByName` in both the description and code example, but neither method name appears in the hints array. Users asking how to set date/converter patterns by property name at call-time would benefit from these being searchable.
findings.source_evidence: Source code example: `.datePatternByName("timestamp", "yyyy年MM月dd日 HH時mm分ss秒")` and `.converterByName("custom", Date.class, new CustomDateConverter())`
